description_long: This church is a large stone structure with a prominent central nave, flanked by tall, narrow arched windows and a steeply pitched slate roof. The facade features a detailed rose window above a recessed entrance, with buttresses and decorative stonework adding to its Gothic character. A tall, pointed steeple rises above the main entrance, accompanied by a bell tower with arched openings and a spire. The rear of the church is semi-octagonal, with additional tall windows and stone detailing. The building sits on a broad stone platform, suggesting a raised foundation or plaza. The overall appearance is imposing and historic, with architectural elements typical of European Gothic churches.
description: A large, stone Gothic church with a tall steeple, rose window, and arched windows, set on a broad stone platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, rose window, and the tall central steeple above the doorway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bell tower, arched windows, and the detailed stonework along the nave.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the semi-octagonal apse with tall windows and buttresses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the nave, rose window, and the bell tower's side profile.
